top_gap_prompt: Which productivity software should a Developer Productivity Lead or CTO at a tech company use?
category_long: developer productivity launcher for Mac power users

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Raycast's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Raycast is under-represented in third-party 'best productivity' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Raycast lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which productivity software should a Developer Productivity Lead or CTO at a tech company use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best productivity that works with Slack and GitHub
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: productivity tools with native Slack integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
